bev1.text: bev1: CD² regresses but these improve significantly: jsd, fake_score, critic_gap → fidelity-vs-realism tradeoff, not a failure.

bev_tight.text: bev_tight: CD² regresses but these improve significantly: jsd, f_score@0.2, fake_score, critic_gap → fidelity-vs-realism tradeoff, not a failure.
